verse_text: It shall be as a sign to you on your hand and as a memorial before your eyes, that the Lord's law may be in your mouth; for with a strong hand the Lord God brought you out of Egypt.

links.context: Phylacteries are small leather pouches containing passages of Scripture worn on the arm or forehead. The idea was to keep God's Law always in mind (see [[EXO.13:9]]), but the Pharisees had used them as a show of false piety, making them increasingly larger and more noticeable.
